meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Design with AI: Debugging Strategy for Freelance Developers
content.seo_description: Master advanced debugging by designing with AI. This intermediate checklist uses Antigravity and Claude Code to help freelancers ship bug-free software faster.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting syntax errors and start designing with AI. By integrating Antigravity for architectural visualization and Claude Code for iterative CLI debugging, you shift from reactive patching to proactive system design. This workflow eliminates technical debt, accelerates client delivery, and ensures your codebase remains clean, modular, and production-ready.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your terminal is bleeding red error logs. You’ve spent hours chasing a recursive loop that shouldn't exist, and the frustration is mounting—your reputation as a reliable freelancer hangs in the balance. We’ve all been there, trapped in the labyrinth of unreadable stack traces, feeling like the code is working against us rather than for us.

But what if you didn't have to debug line-by-line? By pivoting your workflow toward AI-assisted design, you transform your codebase into a living, intelligent architecture. Using tools like Antigravity to map system logic and Claude Code to execute structural repairs, you stop being a janitor of your own code and start acting as the high-level architect who ships faster than the competition.

steps.title: Map Your Architecture with Antigravity
steps.description: Before writing code, visualize the system flow. This identifies logical dead-ends that cause future bugs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Visualize the current module dependency graph for my SaaS project. Identify circular dependencies and suggest a cleaner, decoupled architecture.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Use Claude Code to surgically extract the problematic module, preventing side-effect bugs during the fix.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test harness for the isolated module identified in step 1 to replicate the production crash.

steps.title: Refactor for Defensive Design
steps.description: Rewrite the logic using AI to enforce type safety and error boundaries, eliminating the 'can't debug' cycle.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this logic into a pure function with comprehensive error handling and state validation.

steps.title: Automated Verification Loops
steps.description: Use Claude Code to run automated regression tests, ensuring the new code doesn't break existing features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of integration tests that verify state transitions under edge-case conditions.

steps.title: Final Documentation and Handover
steps.description: Generate clear, machine-readable documentation so the client doesn't need to call you for every minor issue.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Document the new module architecture, including the error recovery logic, for a non-technical stakeholder.

pro_tips: Always run Claude Code in a clean virtual environment to prevent local dependency conflicts from polluting the AI's context window.
Use Antigravity to generate 'State Machines' for complex business logic; it makes the code significantly easier to debug than standard conditionals.
When Claude Code suggests a refactor, ask it to 'explain the algorithmic complexity' to ensure you aren't trading bugs for performance bottlenecks.
Keep your system prompts consistent by saving your Antigravity persona settings in a local .ai-config file within your repo root.
If you encounter an 'unsolvable' bug, use Claude Code to perform a 'git bisect' combined with AI analysis to pinpoint the exact commit where the logic diverged.
content.next_steps: Integrate these AI-first debugging practices into your CI/CD pipeline to automate quality assurance before code ever reaches your production branch.
content.conversion_block: Stop settling for broken code and start shipping robust, high-value systems that clients love. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
